Grid.TextBlock:
1. (S) SITUATION: Our forces are en route Attu Island attempting to seize the island to gain a strategic advantage in the ongoing peace talks between the Warsaw Pact and NATO. We assess that NATO knows our forces left Kamchatka, but inclement weather has prevented our location being detected for several days. However, as we approach Attu, expect to be quickly located and attacked by air and surface forces. Prepare your forces and proceed to the Invasion Force Launch Point.
2. (S) MISSION: 2.1 Deliver your escorts to the launch point. 2.2 Destroy all NATO forces as able.
3. (S) EXECUTION: 3.1 EMCON policy at your discretion. Recommend air search RADAR to prevent surprise air attack. 3.2 Reconnaissance and Defensive Counter Air are under your direct control.
4. (S) ENEMY OOB: 4.1 SAG Alpha 4.1.1 3x Pegasus Missile Boats 4.2 TF 75.3 4.2.1 UNK - Potential surge from Hawaii 4.3 Air Forces 4.3.1 Multiple F-14s missing from imagery 4.3.2 Multiple A-6s and A-7s missing from imagery
5. (S) FRIENDLY OOB: 5.1 Task Force Vostok 5.1.1 Stoykiy EM-679 5.1.2 Slava RKR-103 5.1.3 Vasily Chapayev BPK-511 5.2 Invasion Force 5.2.1 Boevoy EM-678 5.2.2 Petropavlovsk BPK-591 5.2.3 Admiral Oktyabrsky BPK-573 5.2.4 2x Amphibious forces 5.3 Air Forces 5.3.1 Tu-95RT Reconaissance Plane 5.3.2 4x MIG-25PD Interceptors
6. (S) INTEL ASSESSMENT: 6.1 Assess with medium confidence that NATO will surge surface forces from TF 75.3 north. 6.2 Assess with high confidence that NATO aircraft will support the defense. 6.3 Assess with high confidence that NATO SAG Alpha is underway from Attu.
